plugins.name: alpine-htmx
plugins.description: Expert guidance for Alpine.js v3 and HTMX development — directives, attributes, patterns, and combined usage. Includes a proactive code reviewer for anti-patterns, accessibility, and security.

plugins.name: foundryvtt-dev
plugins.description: Expert guidance for FoundryVTT v13 system and module development — ApplicationV2 migration, sheets, forms, actions, tabs, drag-drop, hooks, data model, testing, and i18n. Includes a proactive code reviewer for deprecated patterns and common mistakes. Not affiliated with Foundry Gaming LLC.
